function solve(nums, k) {

    let totalSum = nums.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);

    let S = 0;

    let dp_prev = 0;

    let modMap = {0: 0};

    for (let num of nums) {

        S += num;

        const currentMod = S % k;

        let max_prev = modMap[currentMod] || -Infinity;

        const possible = max_prev + S;

        const dp_current = Math.max(dp_prev, possible);

        // Update modMap for currentMod

        const newValue = dp_current - S;

        if (modMap[currentMod] === undefined) {

            modMap[currentMod] = newValue;

        } else {

            if (newValue > modMap[currentMod]) {

                modMap[currentMod] = newValue;

            }

        }

        dp_prev = dp_current;

    }

    return totalSum - dp_prev;

}
